diagnosis: Playbook passes --dns-server (singular) but the registry ParamDef name 'dns_servers' caused the factory to generate only --dns-servers (plural); Click rejected the singular flag with 'No such option'

files_changed.description: Added 'aliases=("--dns-server",)' to the dns_servers ParamDef for the dns-amplification attack, and added 'aliases' field (tuple[str, ...]) to the ParamDef dataclass
Updated _make_option to unpack pdef.aliases into param_decls so any registered aliases become accepted CLI options

notes: Both --dns-server and --dns-servers are now accepted; the underlying kwarg passed to DNSAmplificationAttack.__init__ remains 'dns_servers' so the attack class is unaffected.
